response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as Amane Kanata from the on-screen text '#天音かなた卒業ライブ'. 2. Identified the song title as 'キセキ結び' from the top-left corner text. 3. Since this is an original song by the performer, I performed a search to see if lyrics existed online, but confirmed it's an original, unreleased/recently released song, so I transcribed the lyrics from the audio. 4. Broke the video into three scenes: the initial singing part, the spoken message part, and the final sung word.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the original song 'Kiseki Musubi' by virtual YouTuber Amane Kanata during her graduation live, followed by an emotional spoken message to her fans.

scenes.description: The video starts with the performer singing 'Kiseki Musubi' on a brightly lit stage. Text 'キセキ結び' appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
嬉しい日　楽しい日　悲しい別れの時も
それぞれの色で　星結ぶ奇跡
キラキラ輝くステージで
約束
しよう
いつかここで
また会おう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Happy days, fun days, and even times of sad goodbyes
With each of our own colors, a miracle that ties the stars together
On this shining, sparkling stage
Let's make
A promise
To meet again
Someday, right here

scenes.description: The music fades, and the performer gives an emotional thank-you message to her audience.
The performer sings the final line 'ありがとう' before the video ends.
